name: HWM Large-diameter Horizontal IoT Water Meter
desc: Large-diameter horizontal spiral-wing IoT water meter, DN40–DN250, R50, NB-IoT/4G, IP68. High adaptability to complex environments.
overview: The HWM Horizontal Large-diameter IoT Water Meter uses a new-generation microprocessor to measure water volume in large horizontal mains, then transmit data via NB-IoT / 4G for remote billing and management. The dual-way communication supports valve control addition. Compatible with direct reading cameras (HWC) for alternate reading methods.

specs.label: Valve control (optional)
specs.value: Integrated electric valve for remote control

features: Carrier-network transmission — stable, reliable, secure; plug-and-play on installation
Non-contact mechanical electronic encoding structure, no mechanical wear
Remote encrypted data transmission ensures signal security against interception
Ultra-low power with high-density Li-SOCl₂ battery + capacitor stabilisation — 6+ year service life
Periodic scheduled reading, active wake-up, real-time water volume reporting with threshold alerts
Dual-electronic anti-magnetic structure prevents interference; head unit removable for on-site replacement
Integrated control valve for remote open / close via cloud or on-site command
Self-diagnostic function for fault detection and anti-interference
